sentiment.reasoning: An 8% decline in operating income indicates a moderate deterioration in core business performance.

sentiment.reasoning: Delaying a product launch postpones expected revenue and may signal internal execution or technical challenges.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
